title: How long is "Higher for Longer"
summary:
Main
By George Lagarias
The three things I would tell my clients this morning
Markets consistently underestimate the Fed's willingness to fight inflation. That's why, when last week the Fed raised its rate forecast for 2024, both equities and bonds retrenched significantly. Investors should position as best as they can for both the good scenario (rate cuts into 2024) or the bad scenario (no rate cuts before early 2025).

children.title: How long is "higher for longer"?
children.summary: A consistent element of this rate hike cycle has been the differential between market optimism and Fed intentions. Since early 2022, markets were never really convinced about how far the Fed was willing to take things.
